desc_ar: إنجليزي بسيط عن خدمة العملاء: مشكلة الزبون، والحل، والعبارات المهذبة على الهاتف وفي المحل.
why_ar: لتتعلّم كلمات الإنجليزي التي تساعدك على فهم الزبون وحل مشكلته بأدب.
outcomes: تقرأ نصاً بسيطاً عن خدمة العملاء
تستخدم أفعال الماضي غير المنتظمة مثل went و said و bought
تكتب قصة قصيرة عن مساعدة زبون
warmup: هل ساعدت زبوناً في مشكلة من قبل؟
ما آخر مرة اشتكيت فيها من منتج أو خدمة؟

grammar.explain_ar: نستخدم الماضي البسيط لشيء حدث وانتهى في الماضي. الأفعال المنتظمة نضيف لها ed. لكن الأفعال غير المنتظمة لها صيغة خاصة ولا نضيف لها ed. مثال: go تصبح went، و buy تصبح bought، و say تصبح said. تذكّر هذه الأفعال المهمة: went, said, bought, gave, came, took, made.
grammar.explain_en_html:
Past Simple — Irregular Verbs

We use the past simple for a finished action in the past. Regular verbs add -ed (help → helped). But irregular verbs change their form and do not add -ed:
go → went, say → said, buy → bought, give → gave, come → came, take → took, make → made.

A customer came to the shop. The worker gave him a refund.

examples.sentence: A customer came to the shop yesterday.
The worker gave him a new phone.
She bought a red bag last week.

mistakes.explanation_ar: فعل go غير منتظم، ماضيه went وليس goed.
فعل buy غير منتظم، ماضيه bought وليس buyed.

exercises.instruction_ar: اختر صيغة الماضي الصحيحة للفعل غير المنتظم

items.question: The customer ___ to the shop yesterday.
items.explanation_ar: ماضي come هو came، فعل غير منتظم.

items.question: The worker ___ him a refund.
items.explanation_ar: ماضي give هو gave، فعل غير منتظم.

items.question: She ___ a new bag last week.
items.explanation_ar: ماضي buy هو bought، فعل غير منتظم.

readings.label: A
paragraphs: Last week, a *customer* *came* to a small phone shop. He *bought* a new phone two days before. But the phone did not work. The man was not happy. He *said*, 'This phone is broken.'

Omar was the *worker* in the shop. He was calm and kind. He said, 'I am sorry. Let me help you.' Omar took the phone and looked at it. The screen was black. Omar made a quick check. Then he knew the *problem*.

Omar *gave* the man a new phone. He also gave him a small *gift*. The customer was happy again. He said, 'Thank you very much.' Then he *went* home with a smile. Good *service* makes customers happy. A good worker listens to the customer. This is why people come back to the shop.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: A worker helps a customer with a problem
A trip to a new city
questions.correct_answer: A worker helps a customer with a problem
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن موظف يساعد زبوناً في حل مشكلة هاتفه.
قال النص إن الرجل اشترى هاتفاً جديداً.

questions.question_en: What did Omar give the man?
choices: A new phone and a small gift
questions.correct_answer: A new phone and a small gift
questions.explanation_ar: أعطاه عمر هاتفاً جديداً وهدية صغيرة.

choices: something that is wrong or hard
questions.correct_answer: something that is wrong or hard
questions.explanation_ar: كلمة problem تعني مشكلة، أي شيء خاطئ أو صعب.

questions.question_en: Why was the man not happy at first?
questions.question_ar: لماذا لم يكن الرجل سعيداً في البداية؟
choices: Because his new phone did not work
questions.correct_answer: Because his new phone did not work
questions.explanation_ar: لم يكن سعيداً لأن هاتفه الجديد لم يعمل.

choices: He took the phone and looked at it
questions.correct_answer: He took the phone and looked at it
questions.explanation_ar: أولاً أخذ عمر الهاتف ونظر إليه.

questions.question_en: Why do people come back to the shop?
questions.explanation_ar: يعودون لأن الخدمة جيدة، كما يشير النص.

vocab: past of come; moved to a place
A man came to the shop.
past of buy; paid money for something
a person who works in a place
something that is wrong or hard
past of give; handed something to someone
He gave the man a refund.
a thing you give to someone for free
The shop gave a small gift.
the help you give to customers

readings.label: B
paragraphs: Sara bought a red bag from an online shop. The shop said the bag would come in three days. But five days went by, and the bag did not come. Sara was worried.

Sara *called* the shop. A kind *worker* named Ali answered the *phone*. She *told* him about the *late* *order*. Ali said, 'I am very sorry for the wait.' He looked at his computer. He *found* the problem fast. The bag was at the wrong *address*.

Ali made a new order for Sara. He *sent* the red bag to her home. He also gave her free *delivery*. Sara felt happy again. Two days later, the bag came to Sara's door. She was very glad. She called the shop and said, 'Thank you for your help.' Good service on the phone kept Sara as a customer.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: A worker helps a customer with a late order
A trip to a new shop
questions.correct_answer: A worker helps a customer with a late order
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن موظف يساعد زبونة في مشكلة طلبية متأخرة.
اشترت سارة حقيبة حمراء من محل على الإنترنت.

questions.question_en: Why did the bag not come on time?
questions.question_ar: لماذا لم تصل الحقيبة في الوقت؟
choices: It went to the wrong address
questions.correct_answer: It went to the wrong address
questions.explanation_ar: لم تصل في الوقت لأنها ذهبت إلى العنوان الخطأ.

questions.question_en: What did Ali give Sara for free?

questions.explanation_ar: كلمة late تعني متأخر، أي ليس في الوقت المحدد.

questions.question_en: What did Sara do after the bag did not come?
questions.question_ar: ماذا فعلت سارة بعد أن لم تصل الحقيبة؟
questions.explanation_ar: بعد أن تأخرت الحقيبة، اتصلت سارة بالمحل.

questions.question_en: Why did Sara stay a customer of the shop?
questions.explanation_ar: بقيت زبونة لأن الخدمة على الهاتف كانت جيدة.

vocab: She called the shop for help.
a person who works in a place
a thing you use to talk to people far away
past of tell; gave information to someone
a thing you ask a shop to send you
past of find; saw where a thing is
the place where a house or shop is
The bag went to the wrong address.
past of send; made a thing go to a place
He sent the bag to her home.
bringing a thing to your home

listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Khalid. I work in a shop. Yesterday a customer came with a broken watch. He was not happy. I said sorry and I took the watch. I gave him a new one and a small gift. He said thank you and went home happy. I love my job because I help people every day.

exercises.explanation_ar: قال خالد إنه يعمل في محل.

exercises.question_en: What did Khalid give the customer?
options: A new watch and a gift
exercises.explanation_ar: أعطى خالد الزبون ساعة جديدة وهدية صغيرة.

exercises.question_en: How did the customer feel at the end?
exercises.explanation_ar: شعر الزبون بالسعادة وذهب إلى بيته سعيداً.

exercises.question_en: Why does Khalid love his job?
options: Because he helps people every day
exercises.explanation_ar: يحب عمله لأنه يساعد الناس كل يوم.

writing.prompt_en: Write a short story about a customer with a problem. What was the problem? How did the worker help? Use past verbs like came, said, and gave.
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب قصة قصيرة عن زبون لديه مشكلة. ما هي المشكلة؟ كيف ساعده الموظف؟ استخدم أفعال الماضي مثل came و said و gave.
hints: A customer came to the shop.
The worker took the item and helped.

speaking.prompt_en: Talk about a time you helped a customer or a friend with a problem. What was the problem? What did you do?
speaking.prompt_ar: تحدث عن مرة ساعدت فيها زبوناً أو صديقاً في مشكلة. ما هي المشكلة؟ وماذا فعلت؟
prep: فكّر في مشكلة ساعدت في حلّها
حضّر أفعال الماضي: came, said, gave, helped
رتّب كلامك: ما المشكلة، ثم كيف ساعدت
phrases: I gave him a new one
